description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker image for the build_image job, runs with the docker:dind service, and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, and IMAGE=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest variables. Define a single build stage and a build_image job that runs on the build stage with the docker tag, executes the commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t $IMAGE ., and if [ "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" = master ]; then docker push $IMAGE; fi. The job is limited to runners tagged docker and has no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
